notes.text: Story created: "Pharmaceutical Shift Feeder Assembly Training" — 15/15 moments generated. Written to C:\autovrse\jsonClaw\stories\Assembly_Training.json

Assembly_Training.json built from Unity scene discovery. 4 chapters, 15 moments. Scene objects verified against live Unity Assembly_Training scene (174 query objects). Cleaned 24 invented Query refs (Cooling Roller (with space)→Cooling Roller, Trolley_Cart→Trolley_Cart 1A, Player/ToastMessage/TargetArrow/ToastPanel→VOPlayer) and stripped audioUrl from 3 SFX StopAndSkip actions. All 26 SFX placeholders resolved (14+12 via generate_sfx). verify_story clean.

Round 2 fixes applied: (1) Hoisted 21 unique Objects/Spawn to M0 onAwake — Trolley_Cart 1A + all 11 grabbables + 9 placepoints — so nothing pops in mid-story. (2) Lowered AmbientFactoryHum volume 0.3→0.15, audioRange 10→12, kept as sole ambient. (3) Stripped 13 ornamental SFX (IntroChime/InstructionChime/TrolleyArrival/InspectionConfirm/ChapterComplete/VerificationSuccess/AmbientWorkshop) plus 3 SFXPlayer/StopAndSkip actions that were killing the ambient. (4) Rewrote M7 (Shaking Tray) to no-interaction auto-place: VO → TimerAction 2s → ObjectAnimationAction PositionRotation to ShakingGratePlacePoint (lerp 2.5s) → VibrationDampingSettle SFX → confirm VO. verify_story clean.

Round 3: Per user clarification ("tray = shift feeder"), all Shift Feeder * moments (M3 Base, M4 Cover, M5 Combined, M6 Tubes, M7 Shaking Tray, M8 Feeding Chute) are now no-interaction auto-place. Each: onAwake sets isGrabbable=false + clears highlights; onStart runs VO → TimerAction 2s → ObjectAnimationAction PositionRotation to its placepoint (lerp 2.5s) → SFX feedback → confirm VO; onRight/onWrong/onFirstWarning/onLastWarning empty; onEnd transition VO. M9-M11 (Feeder Pipe, Dancing Roller, Skimming Assembly) and M13 (Clamps) remain grab+placepoint interactive. verify_story clean.

Round 4: Fixed three issues. (1) Removed duplicate AmbientFactoryHum PlayLoop at M12 onStart - only the M0 ambient now plays. (2) Removed Objects/Despawn for Trolley_Cart 1A at M2 onAwake - trolley stays visible across the run. (3) M9 Feeder Pipe placepoint visibility: dropped the onAwake hide-everything SetActive on FeederPipesPlacePoint, added explicit Highlighter Edit (system highlighter material) and TargetGuidanceArrowAction Enable in onStart, plus Disable arrow on CorrectPlace. M10/M11/M13 use the same hide-then-Edit pattern and look fine - the M9 placepoint scene object likely lacks a clean renderer for outline shading, so we added guidance arrow + highlighter as renderer-independent visual cues.

Round 5 (final): Whole story is now passive narration + animation. Converted M9 Feeder Pipe, M10 Dancing Roller, M11 Skimming Assembly, M13 Secure Clamps (two-clamp ObjectAnimationAction Rotation to ClampRot1/ClampRot2), and the two touch-tour moments M1 Fixed Component Inspection + M12 Verification Tour (now pure VO narration with timer pauses). All 15 moments report [AUTO] (zero onRight triggerActionSets, zero onWrong). verify_story clean. Object catalog dropped to 24 (Hopper Assembly / IndexRoller / Cooling Roller / Sweep Brush / DyePlates_2 / Haptics no longer referenced since touch interactions removed).

moments.name: Introduction & Training Overview
moments.spatialContext: Player standing at EXPERIENCE PANEL_NEW, viewing intro screen

moments.name: Fixed Component Inspection
moments.userAction: Touch Hopper Assembly, IndexRoller, and Cooling Roller (with space) to inspect pre-installed components
moments.successHint: Each component highlights briefly on touch; VO confirms component name and function
moments.spatialContext: Fixed components mounted on tablet-press chassis, positioned at chest-to-waist height around the work area

moments.name: Parts Trolley Arrival
moments.spatialContext: Trolley_Cart 1A arrives to the left of player; camera focuses on parts trolley

moments.name: Install Shift Feeder Base
moments.userAction: Grab Shift Feeder Base from trolley and place onto ShiftFeederBottomPlacePoint
moments.successHint: Snap-in sound plays; ghost mesh disappears; VO confirms base is secured
moments.spatialContext: PlacePoint is at base of tablet-press chassis, waist height, center front

moments.name: Attach Shift Feeder Base Cover
moments.userAction: Grab Shift Feeder Base Cover from trolley and place onto ShiftFeederUpperCoverPlacePoint
moments.successHint: Cover locks with metallic click; VO praises alignment
moments.spatialContext: Cover PlacePoint is directly above the installed base, chest height

moments.name: Mount ShiftFeederBaseCombined
moments.userAction: Grab ShiftFeederBaseCombined from trolley and place onto ShiftFeederBaseCombinedPlacePoint
moments.successHint: Unified assembly snaps into place; success SFX; VO confirms combined unit seated correctly
moments.spatialContext: Combined PlacePoint integrates the base assembly, center of chassis at waist-to-chest height

moments.name: Install Shift Feeder Tube Assembly
moments.userAction: Grab Shift Feeder Tube Assembly from trolley and place onto ShiftFeederTubesPlacePoint
moments.successHint: Tubes lock into guide channels; VO confirms tube routing correct
moments.spatialContext: Tubes PlacePoint connects to side of base assembly, angled upward, chest height

moments.name: Position Shift Feeder Shaking Tray
moments.userAction: Grab Shift Feeder Shaking Tray from trolley and place onto ShakingGratePlacePoint
moments.successHint: Tray settles with vibration damping sound; VO confirms shaking mechanism ready
moments.spatialContext: Grate PlacePoint is upper-mid section of feeder, slightly forward, chest height

moments.name: Attach Shift Feeder Feeding Chute
moments.userAction: Grab Shift Feeder Feeding Chute from trolley and place onto ShiftFeederUpperPlacePoint
moments.successHint: Chute aligns with hopper; VO confirms feed path established
moments.spatialContext: Upper PlacePoint is at top of shift feeder assembly, above eye level, angled toward hopper

moments.name: Connect Feeder Pipe
moments.userAction: Grab Feeder Pipe from trolley and place onto FeederPipesPlacePoint
moments.successHint: Pipe connection clicks; VO confirms pneumatic or material feed line connected
moments.spatialContext: Pipes PlacePoint connects lateral to feeder chute, shoulder height, right side

moments.name: Install Dancing Roller
moments.userAction: Grab Dancing Roller from trolley and place onto DanicingRollerPlacePoint
moments.successHint: Roller seats into bearing mounts; VO confirms roller free to rotate
moments.spatialContext: Danicing (spelling intentional) PlacePoint is mid-front of feeder, waist-to-chest height

moments.name: Mount Skimming Assembly
moments.userAction: Grab Skimming Assembly from trolley and place onto SkimmingAssemblyPlacePoint
moments.successHint: Skimming blade locks into guide rails; VO confirms assembly complete, ready for verification
moments.spatialContext: Skimming PlacePoint is upper-front edge of feeder, chest height, above shaking tray

moments.name: Verification Tour
moments.userAction: Touch Cooling Roller (with space), Sweep Brush, and DyePlates_2 (Upper) to verify final assembly integrity
moments.successHint: Each touch highlights component with green outline; VO confirms component operational and correctly seated
moments.spatialContext: Components are distributed around the completed assembly — Cooling Roller rear-left, Sweep Brush front-center, DyePlates upper-right

moments.name: Secure Clamps
moments.userAction: Grab and engage Clamps_1 and Clamps_2 to lock the shift feeder assembly onto the tablet-press chassis
moments.successHint: Each clamp produces a locking ratchet sound; haptic feedback on engagement; VO confirms assembly mechanically secured
moments.spatialContext: Clamps_1 positioned lower-left of assembly, Clamps_2 lower-right, both at waist height, accessible from front

moments.name: Completion Summary
moments.spatialContext: Player returns to EXPERIENCE PANEL_NEW; completion SFX plays; VO recaps assembly steps and congratulates successful completion
